response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, seasoned generalist with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, and he meets the baseline language and experience requirements. However, this is a Principal (IC6) role centered on experimentation platforms, growth measurement, telemetry, and statistical analysis at enterprise scale, and his resume shows no experimentation, feature-flagging, metrics/guardrail, or growth-engineering experience. His scope has been senior IC work at startups and mid-size companies rather than multi-workstream technical leadership across teams, making the fit for this specific role weak despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience (15+ yrs) spanning required languages including JavaScript/TypeScript, C/C++, C#, and Java
Real high-scale production experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby building low-latency services handling millions of requests per second
Hands-on AI-agent tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) matching the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, telemetry-platform, or growth-engineering experience anywhere in the resume
Career level is Senior/Staff at small-to-mid companies; no evidence of Principal-scope, multi-team architectural leadership or stakeholder alignment
Little demonstrated data/statistical analysis depth (metrics design, bias detection, rollout-risk management) required for the role's core mission

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Principal IC6 multi-team leadership
Strong fundamentals with proven high-scale distributed systems work
